The parable of Klara Maple part 1
The parable of Klara Maple part 1
I woke up this morning feeling tired and dreary,
my eyes were filled with little raindrops
My legs were feeling dead and rigid,
Light poured out from the window
as the sun slowly rose from below.
My name is Klara Maple, I used to work at
an old cheese factory in the city.
The work times were long but they paid well,
it was quite a pleasant place too.
However, not all was well with this weird place.
This is the day I found this out,
it started off like any other day,
with a certain anger in her voice,
“Come down right now or you’ll be late for work!”
I jumped out of bed and raced down the stairs;
When I got down I saw an enraged woman
go this instant or you might lose your job!”
I sprinted out the door with unrivalled speed,
not even stopping to put shoes on,
If there was an award for ‘quickest run to work’
I stumbled through the bushes as a shortcut

In a small village in the corner of Alaudia, there
One day, he felt like leaning back against a tall,
brick wall while he was eating lunch.
About half way into his sandwich, he saw a strange
looking woman walking past him in a long top hat.
A bit startled, the man jumped forward to try and talk
A bit unnerved, but wanting to continue his lunch,
he turned back around to move back towards the wall.
When the man turned his head to the brick wall behind
him, he realised that the wall was no longer there!
All he could see was a large, blue void in its place.
The blue void was now everywhere.
Eventually, the world went back to normal. But, after
about a week. The man vanished. Never to be seen again.
